Off Calendar Oct-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's motion for assignment of rights, restraining and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
